name: Reduce tracked repository size after trash cleanup

doc/ removal + unrelated files already cleaned by prior session

Reduced tracked repository size by removing generated HTML exports from atropos/notebooks/html, grpo-results/html, and experiments/html, and added ignore rules so these derived artifacts do not get re-committed.

The updated autoresearch.sh in the working tree also reports additional non-size hygiene issues (duplicate notebooks, tracked PDFs, missing ignore patterns), but the primary size metric still improved.
